_comment: Keyed by the last URL path segment of the Medium post link (before the ?source= query string). Article titles and excerpts display in their original language (no translation). desc_th overrides the auto-generated excerpt; tag_th/tag_en label the category chip (UI, bilingual); swatch is sys|mind; popular adds the 👏 badge.
